features.name: procedural event control in while loop
features.description: Code should include an @(posedge) timing control statement placed inside a while loop within an initial block
features.snippet: initial begin while (condition) @(posedge clk); x = y; end

features.name: testbench while loop with clock edge wait
features.description: Code should include a while loop containing @(posedge clk) used for waiting on clock edges in a testbench
features.snippet: while (data_ready) begin @(posedge clk); q = data; end
